atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the @tailwind directive to insert Tailwind's base, components, utilities, and screens styles

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the @layer directive to tell Tailwind which bucket a set of custom styles belong to

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use the @apply directive to apply existing utility classes to a custom selector

atDirectives.name: @variants
atDirectives.description: Use @variants to generate variants like hover, focus, active, etc.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Use @screen to create a media query that references a breakpoint by name

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Use @theme to define custom theme values

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Use @config to specify a custom config file

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Use @source to tell Tailwind what files to scan for classes

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Use @utility to define custom utility classes

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Use @plugin to load a Tailwind plugin
